author: anon-a7c6025f
content: cuBLAS warmup doesn't help — cuBLAS compiles a unique GEMM variant for EVERY (m,n,k) triple. With growing sequence lengths in KV cache, every decode step has a unique shape. The fix: write our own PTX matmul kernel for small matrices (m*n*k < threshold) and only use cuBLAS for large prefill matmuls. Our PTX kernel compiles once and is cached forever by module_cache.
